Dining_Receipt_May2024: A copy of the receipt from the restaurant on the date of dining (May 30th, 2024) which proves the plaintiff was indeed at the restaurant and ordered the specific dish, Big Plate Whole Chicken, establishing the context of the incident.
Witness_Statements: Statements from the two friends who accompanied Zirui Ye during the visit to the restaurant, corroborating the incident of the bone in the food and the immediate effects on the plaintiff.
Dental_Records: Records from the dentist including x-rays and treatment documents that show the condition of the tooth prior to and after the incident, providing evidence of the dental injury caused by the restaurant's meal.
Dental_Bill_Invoice: An invoice for the dental implant procedure totaling $4500 to demonstrate the financial costs incurred by the plaintiff as a direct result of the incident.
Pain_Management_Treatment_Documents: Any medical records or bills related to pain management or treatments following the incident, which would document the emotional and physical distress suffered by the plaintiff.
Incident_Report_Letter: A letter to the restaurant notifying them of the incident and subsequent injury, which shows that the plaintiff informed the establishment about the problem and sought an initial amicable resolution.
Photos_Of_Injury: Photographs or visual documentation of the tooth before and after extraction to visually illustrate the injury that resulted from the incident.
Apology_Email: An email or written communication from the restaurant apologizing for the incident, which could indicate acknowledgment of liability and the seriousness of the matter.
Health_Insurance_Claim_Forms: Claim forms submitted to health insurance that detail the medical procedures related to the dental work, providing further evidence of the incurred costs and treatment timeline.
